findings.detail: Source-level pre-flight passed: 8 nodes (within 3–8), all labels plain-language (no acronyms), all concepts trace to §5.1–§5.5 and §6 of the corpus, title in config block. Two-panel layout (gender direction illustration vs. arithmetic steps) correctly models the two parallel concerns. PNG rendered at 43,868 bytes.

stats.layout: flowchart LR (side-by-side panels with nested TB subgraphs)
